coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 7:48. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 75%, 85-100 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 105%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 105% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 3:00 at 105-105%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 3:00 at 115%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/9. 7 to go. You've accumulated 3min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/9. You're building something real here. 7 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/9. 115% FTP. Keep 90-95 rpm steady. Don't let form collapse.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 6 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 6min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 90-95 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 28% complete. Block 1/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 32 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 44% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 24 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 21 minutes in. 105% at 95-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 44% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 5 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 44% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 44% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 50% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 50% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 50% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. 115% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 56% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 18 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 27 minutes in. 105% at 95-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 56% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 3 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 56% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 56% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 62% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 18min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 30 minutes of work done. 13 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 13 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 2 blocks left. 10 minutes total. You wanted faster. This is how. Stop thinking, pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 3/3. 73% complete. Hold 105% steady. 10 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 73% complete. Block 3/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% done. 2 blocks left. Only. ONLY. *laughs maniacally*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 73% into session. Seated at 85-90 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 8/9. 38 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 79% through session. Rep 8/9. You've done 21min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 38 minutes of work done. 7 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 38 minutes in. 115% FTP, 85-90 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 105% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 3:00 at 105%. Then 4min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 4min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 105% × 3:00. Give it everything. 4min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 44 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 91% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 91% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 91% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 91% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
